name: ai-translator-root
description: Monorepo root for AI Translator Web App

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm run build:server
scripts.build:all: npm run install:all && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
